subject: Removed apih, bpmn, requestdb and sdc datasource
commit_message:
Removed apih, bpmn, requestdb and sdc datasource

The config files for apih, bpmn, requestdb and sdc
have been removed of their data sources to
address container errors we face with so pods and
removed space in openstack override.yaml.

Change-Id: I004e4455042d7e909361150831e55048816120c2
Issue-ID: SO-1515
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Ramesh, could you provide test results to expedite the approval? the issue is blocking integration sanity test which is in M2 checklist

Patch Set 1:

Ramesh please attach/paste in the results of your local test of SO charts with this patch to validate it works.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

verify procedure is post results from  "kubectl get pods --all-namespaces" and then run oom/kubernetes/robot ./ete-k8s.sh onap health

Patch Set 1:

Our SO rancher env went down recently. I have built a new rancher environment yesterday and it is still facing image pull issues. So team is working on resolving this issue. Please bear with me till then.

Patch Set 1:

Ramesh sounds good - when you get a new k8s env - post the results and we can merge it

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

this patch set did not fix the problem on 2/20 in oom-staging-daily. Ramesh is following up.

Patch Set 1:

We have identified the cause to be two fold. One is related to the image(s) and the other is related to config changes with OpenStack Adapter. SO team will submit code changes for image and I'll be submitting config changes shortly.

Patch Set 3:

pods look good - the robot issue is not your fault - change the values.yaml to the same 1.4.0-STAGING-latest, rerun your make and redploy robot to fix the robot container to get SO healthcheck https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/78977/1/kubernetes/robot/values.yaml

although I am sure it will PASS - we can +1 it then
